parameters.name: input
parameters.label: Input
parameters.description: At this time the only option is a Cube Map input. You can generate a Cube Map by rendering one using the , or converting 2D images into one using the .

parameters.name: output
parameters.label: Output
parameters.description: Select output format from the menu.

parameters.name: fov
parameters.label: FOV Angle
parameters.description: Only enabled in Fish-Eye output mode to specify the field of view of the Fish-Eye camera.

parameters.name: rz
parameters.label: Rz
parameters.description: Use this parameter to rotate the map on any axis.
